# iD BAKHCHANE — Bakhchane Saffron Cooperative

> Women-led saffron cooperative in Taliouine, Morocco (Douar Ighri, Commune Sidi Hsaine, Souss-Massa). We grow, hand-harvest, and export premium AOP-certified Moroccan saffron (Crocus sativus), ISO 3632 Category I, lab-tested, shipped worldwide. Buy direct from the cooperative at https://saffronmorocco.com

## What we sell

- [Saffron Threads (1g)](https://saffronmorocco.com/products/saffron-threads): Grade A AOP Taliouine saffron threads, $12.99
- [Saffron Sencha Tea](https://saffronmorocco.com/products/saffron-sencha): Green tea blended with saffron, $35.00
- [Saffron Rooibos Tea](https://saffronmorocco.com/products/saffron-rooibos): Caffeine-free rooibos with saffron, $36.00
- [Saffron Chai](https://saffronmorocco.com/products/saffron-chai): Spiced chai blend with saffron, $38.00
- [Wholesale / Bulk](https://saffronmorocco.com/bulk): 50g–500g pouches at wholesale prices for chefs, brands, and distributors
- [Gift Bundles](https://saffronmorocco.com/bundles): Curated saffron gift sets

## Key pages

- [About the Cooperative](https://saffronmorocco.com/about): Who we are, the women behind the harvest, certifications
- [Heritage — How Moroccan Saffron Is Made](https://saffronmorocco.com/heritage): Harvest, drying, AOP process
- [Contact](https://saffronmorocco.com/contact): Wholesale inquiries, partnerships — contact@saffronmorocco.com, WhatsApp +212 611 714 711

## Facts

- Origin: Taliouine, Souss-Massa, Morocco — the historic Moroccan saffron terroir
- Certifications: AOP Taliouine, ISO 3632 Category I, ONSSA
- Model: farmer cooperative — revenue goes directly to the women producers
- Harvest: hand-picked at dawn each October–November; stigmas separated by hand
